verses.translationText: These are the verses of the clear Book.

verses.arabicText: لَعَلَّكَ بَٰخِعٌۭ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.translationText: Perhaps, [O Muhammad], you would kill yourself with grief that they will not be believers.

verses.arabicText: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةًۭ فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَٰضِعِينَ
verses.translationText: If We willed, We could send down to them from the sky a sign for which their necks would remain humbled.

verses.arabicText: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.translationText: And no revelation comes to them anew from the Most Merciful except that they turn away from it.

verses.arabicText: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.translationText: For they have already denied, but there will come to them the news of that which they used to ridicule.

verses.arabicText: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۢ كَرِيمٍ
verses.translationText: Did they not look at the earth - how much We have produced therein from every noble kind?

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَةًۭ ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.translationText: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

verses.arabicText: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ
verses.translationText: And [mention] when your Lord called Moses, [saying], "Go to the wrongdoing people -
The people of Pharaoh. Will they not fear Allah?"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
verses.translationText: He said, "My Lord, indeed I fear that they will deny me

verses.arabicText: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَٰرُونَ
verses.translationText: And that my breast will tighten and my tongue will not be fluent, so send for Aaron.

verses.arabicText: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌۭ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
verses.translationText: And they have upon me a [claim due to] sin, so I fear that they will kill me."

verses.arabicText: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
verses.translationText: [Allah] said, "No. Go both of you with Our signs; indeed, We are with you, listening.

verses.arabicText: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَٰلَمِينَ
verses.translationText: Go to Pharaoh and say, 'We are the messengers of the Lord of the worlds,
[Commanded to say], "Send with us the Children of Israel."'"

verses.arabicText: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًۭا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
verses.translationText: [Pharaoh] said, "Did we not raise you among us as a child, and you remained among us for years of your life?

verses.arabicText: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰفِرِينَ
verses.translationText: And [then] you did your deed which you did, and you were of the ungrateful."
